name: Charminar
description: The iconic 16th-century mosque and monument that defines Hyderabad. Four towering minarets, bustling bazaars below and a panoramic view from the top.
priceDetails: Indian visitors: ₹25 cash / ₹20 cashless. Foreign visitors: ₹300 cash / ₹250 cashless. Children below 15 are usually free. Confirm current ASI rates before payment.

name: Golconda Fort
description: Massive medieval citadel famous for its acoustic marvel, diamond mines and the Sound & Light Show every evening.
priceDetails: Approx. Indian entry: ₹25 cash / ₹20 cashless. Foreign visitor entry is usually higher. Sound & Light Show requires a separate ticket.

name: Qutb Shahi Tombs
description: Seven domed mausoleums of the Qutb Shahi rulers surrounded by lush gardens.
priceDetails: Approx. entry: ₹10 adult, ₹5 child. Camera/parking charges may be extra. Online booking may not always be available.

name: Chowmahalla Palace
description: Former seat of the Asaf Jah dynasty. Four palaces with a grand durbar hall and vintage car collection.
priceDetails: Official visit page lists: Indian adults ₹150, children below 10 ₹50, foreign visitors ₹500, mobile photography ₹50.

name: Falaknuma Palace
description: A 19th-century Palladian mansion turned Taj hotel. Day tours offer a glimpse of the Nizam's opulent lifestyle.
priceDetails: Visits are usually through official Taj/Telangana Tourism packages and can vary by package/date. Check the official portal before planning.

name: Paigah Tombs
description: Hidden gem — intricately carved marble mausoleums of the Paigah noble family.
priceDetails: Generally free or nominal at-site entry. No official online ticketing found; verify access locally before visiting.

name: Birla Mandir
description: Gleaming white marble Venkateswara temple perched atop a 280-ft rock hill with a sweeping view of Hussain Sagar.
priceDetails: Free temple entry. No booking required. Follow temple rules and avoid photography where restricted.

name: Mecca Masjid
description: One of the oldest and largest mosques in India, with bricks made of soil from Mecca.
priceDetails: Free entry. No booking required. Entry may be restricted during prayer times and religious events.

name: Jagannath Temple
description: A replica of the Puri Jagannath Temple, famous for its annual Rath Yatra.
priceDetails: Free darshan entry. No booking required. Festival crowd rules may change during Rath Yatra.

name: Chilkur Balaji Temple
description: The 'Visa Balaji' temple where devotees seek blessings for visa approvals. No hundi — only pradakshinas.
priceDetails: Free entry. No hundi and no paid booking system. Visit the official temple site for darshan guidance.

name: Wonderla Amusement Park
description: Hyderabad's premier theme-and-water park with 40+ rides, wave pools and rain disco.
priceDetails: Dynamic official pricing by date, height, student/senior category and offers. Use Wonderla Hyderabad official booking for live rates.

name: Ozone Water Park
description: Budget-friendly water park with a lazy river, tube slides and wave pool.
priceDetails: Indicative at-site pricing: adult around ₹450, child around ₹300. Confirm with the venue before travel.

name: Ocean Park
description: Popular neighbourhood water park with 20+ water rides and rain dance arena.
priceDetails: Indicative at-site pricing: adult around ₹350, child around ₹250. Confirm with the venue before travel.

name: Ramoji Film City
description: World's largest film studio complex with studio tours, live shows and movie-set exploration.
priceDetails: Package pricing changes by date, event and inclusions. Use the official Ramoji Film City portal for current tour packages.

name: Snow World
description: South India's first snow theme park. Experience artificial snow and ice sculptures at −5 °C.
priceDetails: Indicative session pricing: adult around ₹700, child around ₹600. Check the official/venue portal for live session availability.

name: NTR Gardens
description: Spacious lakeview park with toy train, boating on Hussain Sagar and a laser show.
priceDetails: HMDA/BPP listing: approx. ₹20 adult, ₹10 child. Camera/video charges can be extra.

name: Kishkinta Theme Park
description: Nature-themed amusement park with mythological tableaux and water rides.
priceDetails: Indicative entry/package pricing. Confirm current operating status, tickets and timings with official/venue information before visiting.

name: Paradise Biryani
description: The legendary Hyderabadi biryani institution since 1953.
priceDetails: Restaurant listing only. TourDesk does not provide table booking or food ordering.

name: Café Bahar
description: Hyderabad's iconic breakfast haunt famous for Irani chai and Osmania biscuits.
priceDetails: Restaurant listing only. TourDesk does not provide table booking or food ordering.

name: Laad Bazaar Street Food
description: A sensory walk through the 400-year-old bazaar with haleem, kebabs and Hyderabadi sweets.
priceDetails: Street-food guide only. No booking required. Pay directly at individual stalls.

name: Chutneys
description: South Indian vegetarian restaurant famous for 20+ chutney varieties and Andhra meals.
priceDetails: Restaurant listing only. TourDesk does not provide table booking or food ordering.

name: Hussain Sagar Lake
description: A heart-shaped 16th-century lake at the city's centre with boating to the giant Buddha statue.
priceDetails: Lakefront entry is free. Boating/Buddha statue ferry tickets are separate and bought through official counters/operators.

name: KBR National Park
description: Urban green lung spanning 400 acres with walking trails and over 100 bird species.
priceDetails: Approx. public entry: ₹45 adult, ₹20 child. Monthly/annual walking passes may be available separately.

name: Mrugavani National Park
description: Protected forest reserve with trekking trails through rocky Deccan terrain.
priceDetails: Approx. entry: ₹40 per person. Safari/ride charges may be extra, commonly listed separately.

name: Nehru Zoological Park
description: One of India's largest zoos spanning 380 acres with tigers, lions, giraffes and a butterfly park.
priceDetails: Official zoo booking page lists entrance around ₹100 adult and ₹50 child; train/safari/camera charges are extra.

name: Gandipet (Osman Sagar) Lake
description: A vast reservoir with picnic lawns and golden hour views on Hyderabad's western edge.
priceDetails: Lakefront/promenade access is usually free. Paid boating or garden activities, if active, are separate.

name: Salar Jung Museum
description: One of the world's largest one-man art collections — 43,000 objects including the famous Veiled Rebecca.
priceDetails: Official museum admission: ₹50 Indian adult, ₹20 Indian child above 5, ₹1000 foreign visitor; camera/mobile ticket ₹50.

name: Necklace Road
description: Scenic 3-km waterfront boulevard with the best vantage point for the Buddha statue at dusk.
priceDetails: Public waterfront entry is free. Nearby boating/food/activity charges are separate.

name: Hyderabad Botanical Garden
description: A 270-acre garden with 2,800+ plant species, bamboo grove and seasonal flower beds.
priceDetails: Indicative entry: adult around ₹20, child around ₹10. Confirm current GHMC/park counter pricing before visit.

name: Taramati Baradari
description: A 17th-century open-air pavilion with arched walkways and excellent Golconda Fort views.
priceDetails: Heritage visit/event pricing can vary. Telangana Tourism operates the Haritha Taramati Baradari property and packages.

name: Ananthagiri Hills Trek
description: Green hill station near Hyderabad with forested trekking trails and seasonal waterfalls.
priceDetails: Trek/viewpoint access is generally free. Paid resorts, guides and adventure packages are separate.

name: Manjeera Wildlife Sanctuary
description: Reservoir sanctuary with boat safaris to spot the Mugger crocodile and migratory birds.
priceDetails: Indicative sanctuary/boat-safari pricing. Confirm current forest/tourism department availability before travel.

name: RollaBall Indoor Sports
description: Indoor extreme sports arena with zorbing, archery tag and a climbing wall.
priceDetails: Private venue pricing varies by activity, duration and group size. Use the official venue channel for live packages.

name: Sky Jumper Trampoline Park
description: City's largest trampoline park with dodgeball arenas, foam pits and ninja warrior course.
priceDetails: Pricing varies by slot duration, day and offers. Use SkyJumper official Hyderabad page for current rates.
